summary: Completed comprehensive testing of Shopply v2.2 features: 12 supermarkets, ~2500 products, DoveConviene scraper integration, and new Gestione Prezzi page. All 17 backend tests passed (100%). All frontend tests passed - Prezzi page loads correctly with search preview returning real prices from DoveConviene.
passed_tests: ✅ POST /api/seed: Populates DB with 12 supermarkets and 2532 products across 12 categories
✅ GET /api/supermercati: Returns all 12 supermarkets (Coop, Esselunga, Lidl, Eurospin, Carrefour, Penny, MD, Conad, Aldi, Despar, Unes, Iperal)
✅ GET /api/supermercati/{id}: Returns specific supermarket by ID
✅ GET /api/supermercati/nonexistent: Returns 404 as expected
✅ GET /api/prodotti: Returns products with correct structure
✅ GET /api/prodotti?categoria=Latticini: Filters by category correctly
✅ GET /api/prodotti?in_offerta=true: Returns only products on sale
✅ GET /api/prodotti?search=latte: Search filter works correctly
✅ GET /api/prodotti/autocomplete?q=latte: Returns product suggestions
✅ GET /api/categorie: Returns all 12 categories
✅ GET /api/scraper/categories: Returns 12 categories with search terms
✅ GET /api/scraper/status: Returns scraping status (in_corso, ultimo_scraping, log)
✅ GET /api/scraper/log: Returns scraping history
✅ POST /api/scraper/search-preview?search_term=latte: Returns REAL DoveConviene prices (50 results)
✅ POST /api/scraper/run?search_term=pasta: Triggers background scraping job
✅ Scraper endpoints require authentication (401/403 without token)
✅ GET /api/prodotti/offerte: Returns offers grouped by supermarket
✅ Frontend: Login/Register flow working
✅ Frontend: Navigation bar includes 'Prezzi' link
✅ Frontend: /prezzi page loads with 'Gestione Prezzi' title
✅ Frontend: 'Aggiorna Tutti i Prezzi' button present
✅ Frontend: Search input for product search present
✅ Frontend: 'Categorie Disponibili' section shows all 12 categories
✅ Frontend: Search preview shows real DoveConviene results with prices and discounts
✅ Frontend: Expanding Latticini category shows clickable search terms (latte, yogurt, etc.)
✅ Frontend: 'Storico Aggiornamenti' section present
✅ Frontend: Design uses emerald color scheme, rounded cards, good text contrast
seed_data_creation: POST /api/seed creates 12 supermarkets and 2532 products with realistic Italian grocery prices
context_for_next_testing_agent: Shopply v2.2 fully tested. DoveConviene scraper is REAL web scraping (not mocked) - returns actual prices from live site. Scraping can be slow (1-2s per request). Background scraping via POST /api/scraper/run returns immediately and processes in background. All 12 supermarkets around Pioltello (MI) area: Coop, Esselunga, Lidl, Eurospin, Carrefour, Penny, MD, Conad, Aldi, Despar, Unes, Iperal. App is entirely in Italian.

mocked_apis.DoveConviene scraping: NOT MOCKED - Real web scraping from live DoveConviene.it site

verified_features.supermarkets: 12 supermarkets with correct chains: Coop, Esselunga, Lidl, Eurospin, Carrefour, Penny, MD, Conad, Aldi, Despar, Unes, Iperal
verified_features.products: 2532 products across 12 categories with realistic Italian prices
verified_features.categories: Latticini, Pane e Cereali, Frutta e Verdura, Carne e Pesce, Bevande, Snack e Dolci, Condimenti e Salse, Surgelati, Igiene e Casa, Igiene Personale, Baby e Infanzia, Pet Food
verified_features.scraper: DoveConviene integration working - search-preview returns real prices with discounts
verified_features.prezzi_page: New Gestione Prezzi page fully functional with search, categories, and scraping controls
